summary: Add explicit Context7 and Distill MCP tool calling conventions to the 3 most impactful skill files. research-builder/SKILL.md now has concrete mcp_context7_resolve-library-id and mcp_context7_query-docs steps (replaces vague 'Use Context7 for library docs'). budget-aware-router/SKILL.md now has Phase 3a with mcp_distill_browse_tools and mcp_distill_run_tool steps including cold-start warning. system-prompts.md has a new 'Context Management MCP Tools' section with global rules for when to trigger each tool.
notes: All 3 acceptance criteria verified: resolve-library-id found in research-builder, mcp_distill found in budget-aware-router, both tool names in system-prompts.md. Pure documentation edits, zero code risk.
